proof:
by
  define
  use fun n => ⟨2 * fnz n, ⟨fnz n, rfl⟩⟩
  constructor
  · intro a b h1
    have h2 : 2 * fnz a = 2 * fnz b := Subtype.ext_iff.mp h1
    have h3 : fnz a = fnz b := by linarith
    have h4 : fzn (fnz a) = fzn (fnz b) := congrArg fzn h3
    have ha : (fzn ∘ fnz) a = id a := congrFun fzn_fnz a
    have hb : (fzn ∘ fnz) b = id b := congrFun fzn_fnz b
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq] at ha hb
    rw [ha, hb] at h4
    exact h4
  · intro ⟨m, k, hk⟩
    use fzn k
    apply Subtype.ext
    have h : (fnz ∘ fzn) k = id k := congrFun fnz_fzn k
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq] at h
    simp only [h, hk]
successful_attempts:

    have ha : (fzn ∘ fnz) a = id a := congrFun fzn_fnz a
    have hb : (fzn ∘ fnz) b = id b := congrFun fzn_fnz b
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq] at ha hb

  · intro ⟨m, k, hk⟩

    have h : (fnz ∘ fzn) k = id k := congrFun fnz_fzn k
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq] at h
